/usr/bin/c++ -DVXAIR_PERSISTENCE_TEST=0 -ffreestanding -fno-builtin -nostdlib -fno-pic -fno-pie -fno-stack-protector -mcmodel=kernel -mno-red-zone -mno-mmx -mno-sse -mno-sse2 -mgeneral-regs-only -std=c++20 -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -include stdint.h -include stddef.h -include stdbool.h -O3 -DNDEBUG -T /home/ethan/Vextryn_Air/build/linker.ld -nostdlib -no-pie -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/boot/early_init.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/boot/long_mode_entry.S.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/boot/multiboot2_stub.S.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/drivers/audio/vxair_pcspk.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/drivers/bus/bus_pci.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/drivers/bus/bus_xhci.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/drivers/gpu/vxair_gop.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/drivers/gpu/vxair_gpu_fb.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/drivers/input/vxair_input.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/drivers/storage/ahci.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/drivers/storage/nvme.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/drivers/wireless/ax200.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/drivers/wireless/rtl8852.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/fs/ext2.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/fs/fat32.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/fs/ramdisk.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/fs/vfs.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/fs/vxairfs.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/core/src/kstring.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/core/src/vxair_apic.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/core/src/vxair_context_switch.asm.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/core/src/vxair_idt.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/core/src/vxair_idt_asm.asm.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/core/src/vxair_ipc.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/core/src/vxair_kheap.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/core/src/vxair_log.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/core/src/vxair_main.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/core/src/vxair_pmm.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/core/src/vxair_sched.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/core/src/vxair_syscall.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/core/src/vxair_syscall_entry.asm.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/core/src/vxair_vmm.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/hal/hal_acpi.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/hal/hal_dma.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/hal/hal_dtb.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/hal/hal_pci.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/hal/hal_pm.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/kernel/hal/hal_timer.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/bluetooth/gatt.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/bluetooth/hci.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/bluetooth/l2cap.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/bluetooth/vxair_ble_gatt.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/bluetooth/vxair_bt_profiles.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/core/arp.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/core/ethernet.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/core/icmp.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/core/ip.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/core/loopback.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/core/ndp.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/core/net_core.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/core/netfilter.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/core/socket.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/tcp/tcp.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/tls/tls.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/udp/udp.c.o CMakeFiles/vextryn_air.elf.dir/net/wifi/dhcp.c.o
